social_public_data.notes: Profiles, posts, comments, followers, hashtags, channels, and public social metrics.

social_video_media.notes: Video metadata, transcripts, subtitles, media URLs; yt-dlp only after support probe.

commerce_storefront_generic.notes: Shopify, WooCommerce, and generic product/listing pages with public storefront routes.

local_maps_serp.notes: Google Search, Maps, Places, News, Shopping, and local business discovery.

job_board_ats.notes: Job boards, ATS pages, careers pages, and hiring lead actors.

real_estate_property.notes: Property listings, rentals, auctions, foreclosure, agents, and parcels.

lead_directory_contacts.notes: Business directories, contact extraction, B2B/company/person lead generation.

review_reputation.notes: Product, business, app, and social reviews/ratings/comments.

ads_marketing_seo_intel.notes: Ad libraries, SEO/SERP, rank tracking, keyword and competitor intelligence.

travel_hospitality.notes: Hotels, rentals, flights, tours, attractions, and restaurants.

finance_crypto_market_data.notes: Stocks, crypto, finance filings/quotes/market data; prefer official/public APIs.

news_content_monitoring.notes: News, blogs, articles, monitoring, content extraction, RSS/sitemap.

document_file_feed_api.notes: CSV/XML/JSON feeds, PDFs, public datasets, government/open-data APIs.

browser_render_utility.notes: Screenshots, PDFs, rendered-page capture, link/tech/schema checks.

authenticated_session_scrape.notes: Login/cookie/session workflows; explicit, auditable, user-provided sessions only.

no_code_integration_automation.notes: Automation/integration actors that take actions rather than scrape data; many should be deferred.

generic_web_page_extraction.notes: Fallback for static/dynamic web pages when no specialized family applies.
